behavior_summary: This script implements the NPC Darion's runtime behavior, area-entry dispatcher, conversation/shop interactions, training/combat mini-sequence, and a set of short monologue/bark utilities used during patrol/engagement.
U8P_DARION::schedule (process) computes Darion's current routine based on the time-of-day and writes a persistent routine index (darionSchedule) which other behaviors consult to choose actions.

U8P_DARION::enterFastArea (process) is the fast-interaction entry point: it resets per-NPC references, guards against running when the NPC or related state disallows it (dead, secondexecution, toranDead), and dispatches to movement/monologue routines, a special map/event sequence, or starts an activity depending on map and darionSchedule.

U8P_DARION::func02A8 and U8P_DARION::func0897 are patrol/engagement utilities: they inspect nearby item frames, attempt Npc::pathfind to targets, and on success either run short action demos (U8P_DARION::func0E9D) or emit contextual barks/monologues (U8P_DARION::func0411/U8P_DARION::func09F5) or call a generic animation helper (METHOD::func15E7). They spawn timed helper processes for follow-up behavior.

U8P_DARION::func0411, U8P_DARION::func09F5 and U8P_DARION::func0E9D are localized monologue/action routines that pick lines by distance and random rolls, honor personalization (darionMet), and call orientation/animation helpers (METHOD::func091C/METHOD::func15E7) while scheduling timed follow-ups via FREE::func1C19.

U8P_DARION::use is the player-facing conversation handler: it builds dynamic Ask menus (MenuSet/MenuAdd/MenuUnion), captures player choice, dispatches to shop (U8P_DARION::func10DB) or training/encounter (U8P_DARION::func17F2), and respects conversation guards (somebodyTalking, avatarTooCheap).

U8P_DARION::func10DB implements the shop flow: presents purchasable armor options, confirms payment via FREE::findNearbyItems, attempts to equip or hand over the purchased item (FREE::equipItem), and prints appropriate dialogue for success/failure.

U8P_DARION::func17F2 coordinates a short training/combat mini-game: it sets DarionTraining, spawns animations/timers, tracks U8P_DARION::hit counters (AvatarTookHit, DarionTookHit), enforces a cycle threshold based on Npc::getStr, and performs comprehensive cleanup (clear combat flags, reset refs, restore avatar stasis) when the session ends or the player runs away.
notable_control_flow: U8P_DARION::schedule: guards early-exit when Npc::isDead(this) is true, secondexecution == 1, or toranDead == 0; otherwise branches on FREE::getTimeOfDayPeriod() to set candidate flags then calls METHOD::func143A and on positive process_result() sets darionSchedule and calls METHOD::func133F.

U8P_DARION::enterFastArea: always resets reference slots (0x0205, 0x0204, 0x00F0, 0x0200) up-front, checks map==3 and devonInRule to pick a special event (U8P_DARION::func6227) or to spawn an activity (Npc::cSetActivity) and wait; otherwise dispatches by darionSchedule (1 -> U8P_DARION::func02A8, 3/4 -> U8P_DARION::func0897).

Movement helpers (U8P_DARION::func02A8/U8P_DARION::func0897): loop over candidate frame/index values (from Item::getFrame) and attempt Npc::pathfind; after suspend, process_result() directs either action (U8P_DARION::func0E9D) for certain indices or speech (U8P_DARION::func0411/U8P_DARION::func09F5) or fallback animation (METHOD::func15E7); each branch schedules a FREE::func1C19 spawn with different delays.

U8P_DARION::use conversation: constructs menu array (local2), runs ConversationLoop (Ask + SuspendAssign), uses strcmp on captured choice to call U8P_DARION::func10DB (shop) or U8P_DARION::func17F2 (training), and clears avatarTooCheap when present to abort.
open_questions: Exact semantics of METHOD::func143A and METHOD::func133F called by U8P_DARION::schedule — they appear to compute/apply the U8P_DARION::schedule selection but their precise side effects are not recorded here.
Meaning and lifetime of flags secondexecution and toranDead: they are guards but the higher-level conditions that set/clear them and their intended gameplay triggers are not fully shown.
Precise mapping from Item::getFrame values to world markers/target behaviors (which frame indices correspond to which patrol points or animations) is inferred but not concretely enumerated.

Exact item identifiers/prices used by U8P_DARION::func10DB (shop): FREE::findNearbyItems and FREE::equipItem are called with local3/local4/local5 but the concrete payment item type and reward item ids are not explicit in this extraction.

main_function.name: U8P_DARION::schedule
main_function.purpose: Maintain and compute Darion's current routine index based on time-of-day and guard flags, then store that index into darionSchedule and trigger follow-up scheduling logic.
entry_conditions: Runs as a recurring NPC behavior/scheduler process.
Otherwise triggered periodically to re-evaluate FREE::getTimeOfDayPeriod() and update darionSchedule.

function_map.name: U8P_DARION::schedule
function_map.role: Compute and persist Darion's routine index (darionSchedule) from time-of-day and guard flags; orchestrates high-level state.

function_map.name: U8P_DARION::enterFastArea
function_map.role: Area-entry dispatcher: reset refs, guard, dispatch to behavior (movement, special event, or activity) based on map and darionSchedule.

function_map.name: U8P_DARION::leaveFastArea
function_map.role: Cleanup on fast-area exit — reset per-NPC reference slots to clear interaction state.

function_map.name: U8P_DARION::func02A8
function_map.role: Patrol/engage utility: inspect item frames, attempt Npc::pathfind, on success run action (U8P_DARION::func0E9D) or speech (U8P_DARION::func0411) or animation helper (METHOD::func15E7), and spawn timers.

function_map.name: U8P_DARION::func0897
function_map.role: Alternate patrol/interaction utility similar to U8P_DARION::func02A8, but uses a different frame range and pathfind target; calls U8P_DARION::func09F5 for speech branch.

function_map.name: U8P_DARION::func0411
function_map.role: Short contextual monologue/bark routine; distance- and random-aware, respects darionMet, calls orientation/animation helpers and schedules timed follow-ups.

function_map.name: U8P_DARION::func09F5
function_map.role: Greeting/ambient monologue routine used by U8P_DARION::func0897; distance- and random-aware, respects darionMet and spawns timers.

function_map.name: U8P_DARION::func0E9D
function_map.role: Short action/demo animation sequence invoked when certain frame indices are reached (emits 'En guard!' / 'Watch this!' variants and schedules follow-ups).

function_map.name: U8P_DARION::func10DB
function_map.role: Shop submenu: build Ask menus, capture choices, confirm payment via FREE::findNearbyItems, and give/equip purchased items via FREE::equipItem.

function_map.name: U8P_DARION::func17F2
function_map.role: Training/combat sequence manager: sets DarionTraining, runs spawn/suspend cycles, tracks U8P_DARION::hit counters (AvatarTookHit, DarionTookHit), enforces thresholds, and performs cleanup and state restoration.

function_map.name: U8P_DARION::hit
function_map.role: Stub/process for handling incoming U8P_DARION::hit events (signature present but body unknown in excerpt).

function_map.name: U8P_DARION::gotHit
function_map.role: Stub/process for aftermath when NPC takes damage (signature present but body unknown in excerpt).

function_map.name: U8P_DARION::look
function_map.role: Look/examine handler: returns descriptive barks (name/title/dead variants) when the player inspects Darion.

function_map.name: U8P_DARION::use
function_map.role: Main player conversation handler: builds/updates menus, captures choice, dispatches to shop (U8P_DARION::func10DB), training (U8P_DARION::func17F2) or special replies, and respects conversation guards.

function_map.name: U8P_DARION::func6227
function_map.role: Short special-case monologue/event used when map==3 and devonInRule==1; emits grunts/barks and spawns timers.

internal_calls.purpose: Initiate or query platform scheduling after local U8P_DARION::schedule parameters are set; U8P_DARION::schedule waits on this and uses process_result() to decide whether to write darionSchedule.
Finalize or apply the chosen U8P_DARION::schedule when METHOD::func143A returned success; follow-up behavior trigger.
Invoke special event monologue when on map 3 and devonInRule == 1.
Start a map-specific activity/process (map==3 non-special-case) and wait on it; used to hand control to an activity routine.
Dispatch to patrol/engagement behavior when darionSchedule == 1.
Dispatch to alternate patrol behavior when darionSchedule == 3 or 4.
Perform a short action/demo when pathfind landed on certain frame indices (0/2/4/6 series).
Emit contextual barks when pathfind succeeded for non-action frames and nobodyTalking is false.
Emit contextual barks for the U8P_DARION::func0897 success/speech branch when nobodyTalking is false.
Open the shop submenu when the player selects the purchase option.
Start the training/sparring encounter flow when the player requests training.

external_calls.purpose: Retrieve current time-of-day period to choose candidate U8P_DARION::schedule parameters.
Guard: skip behavior if the NPC is dead.
Branch behavior by current map (special handling when on map 3).
Read nearby item frame/index to choose a target/behavior index for pathfinding.
Request movement to a target; script suspends and checks process_result() to select next action.
Spawn timed helper processes used as delays or follow-up schedulers after actions/lines.
Measure proximity to player to select short vs ambient barks.
Orient/prepare NPC before delivering a bark/monologue.
Trigger animation/post-speech helper after some barks.
Verify player payment items before completing a purchase.
Transfer/equip the purchased item to the player or hold it for them on failure.
Freeze/unfreeze the player avatar during the training encounter.
Clear Darion's temporary immortal flag as part of training cleanup.
Spawn timed delays before emitting grunts/barks in the special map event.

reads.name: darionMet
reads.likely_effect: Personalize barks and dialog choices (alternate lines when the player has met Darion).

reads.name: somebodyTalking
reads.likely_effect: Suppresses speech branches; when true functions avoid calling monologue helpers and U8P_DARION::use animation helpers instead to avoid overlapping dialogue.

reads.name: devonInRule
reads.likely_effect: Triggers a special event/monologue (U8P_DARION::func6227) when Darion is on map 3 and this flag is set.

reads.name: secondexecution
reads.likely_effect: Used as a guard in U8P_DARION::schedule/U8P_DARION::enterFastArea to skip or alter execution—likely prevents duplicate re-entry or repeated scheduling.

reads.name: toranDead
reads.likely_effect: If zero prevents U8P_DARION::schedule/entry behavior (guard against running when a related character is dead).

reads.name: avatarTooCheap
reads.likely_effect: Conversation guard: if set it causes U8P_DARION::use to abort and is then cleared; used to block shop interactions due to insufficient funds/behavior.

reads.name: hasHeart
reads.likely_effect: When true forces emergency dialog/menu path in U8P_DARION::use (alters initial greeting and menu availability).

reads.name: spokeAboutJenna
reads.likely_effect: Toggles a dialog branch about Darion's daughter; affects menu text and options in U8P_DARION::use.

reads.name: hydrosFree
reads.likely_effect: Influences greeting variants when darionMet is set (politeness/greeting style).

reads.name: hasAvaName
reads.likely_effect: Enables personalized greeting using the avatar's name.

writes.name: darionSchedule
writes.likely_effect: Persistent NPC U8P_DARION::schedule index set by U8P_DARION::schedule; determines which patrol/behavior helper U8P_DARION::enterFastArea calls.

writes.name: DarionTraining
writes.likely_effect: Marks that the training/combat sequence is active while U8P_DARION::func17F2 runs; cleared on cleanup.

writes.name: AvatarTookHit
writes.likely_effect: Read/cleared inside U8P_DARION::func17F2 to detect when the avatar was U8P_DARION::hit during training and increment counters.

writes.name: DarionTookHit
writes.likely_effect: Read/cleared inside U8P_DARION::func17F2 to detect when Darion was U8P_DARION::hit during training and increment counters.

writes.name: avatarTooCheap
writes.likely_effect: Cleared by U8P_DARION::use when detected to abort a conversation/shop flow (prevents repeated cheap behavior).

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script implements the NPC Darion's runtime behavior, area-entry dispatcher, conversation/shop interactions, training/combat mini-sequence, and a set of short monologue/bark utilities used during patrol/engagement.
